name: Barbecued Fish
recipeInstructions:
1 Combine all sauce ingredients in a pot.
2 Place over medium heat and bring to a boil until reduced to a thin syrup.
3 Pour the syrup through a strainer and discard the cooked ingredients.
4 Chill the syrup.
5 Place fish steaks or fillets in a baking dish and spoon some syrup over each piece.
6 Marinate in the refrigerator for 1 hour.
7 Cook the fish on a hot grill, basting with a teaspoon of barbecue syrup on each side.
